'''''622''''' was the designation of a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Open Circle Fleet/Legends|Open Circle Fleet]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==History==
During the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]], it carried [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] out of and into battle, and was severely damaged by a [[Unidentified Munificent-class star frigate (Coruscant)|''Munificent''-class star frigate]] during close combat.<ref name="VG" />

It sent out a distress call, as it was pinned down by the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] ship. The [[Munificent-class star frigate/Legends|frigate]] was destroyed by two [[Flak gun/Legends|Flak guns]] aboard the nearby [[Invisible Hand/Legends|''Invisible Hand'']] which were commandeered by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''622'' was free to move on.<ref name="VG" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Episode III Revenge of the Sith (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode III ''Revenge of the Sith'' video game]] {{1st}}
